definitions.text: To display, to have somebody see (something).
examples: The car's dull finish showed years of neglect.
All he had to show for four years of attendance at college was a framed piece of paper.
to show mercy; to show favour

definitions.text: To indicate (a fact) to be true; to demonstrate.
A play, dance, or other entertainment.
examples: There were a thousand people at the show.

definitions.text: Synonym of shive (“wood fragment of the husk of flax or hemp”).
